course.empty: No course dates are currently listed. Get in touch and we'll be happy to help.

individual.title: A licence at your own pace
individual.desc: Don't want to wait for a group date? With an individual course we'll set the pace, dates and lesson times entirely around you. We'll arrange the schedule and terms over the phone.
individual.note: Mobile {phone} — 24/7. We'll gladly help you with a date.

map.desc: In Petržalka, Bratislava, on the ground floor of an apartment block. Bus stop {stop} (buses 68, 83, 92, 95, 96, 192, 196) — then straight along Hrobákova street.
map.placeholderText: The map is provided by Google and stores third-party cookies. Allow it once to display the map.

footer.ctaTitle: Ready to get behind the wheel?
footer.ctaText: Sign up for the next course or just give us a call — we'll help you choose.
footer.about: A modern driving school in Petržalka, Bratislava. Category B1, B licence, refresher lessons and an individual approach.

home.heroBadge: Enrolment for category B1, B licence
home.heroText: Autoškola IKARA in Petržalka, Bratislava. We stand out with an individual approach and high professional quality — we'll prepare you not just for the exams, but to become a confident, fully-fledged driver. You'll drive modern Hyundai vehicles.
home.benefit1Text: Study whenever you want, from phone or computer. Mock tests exactly like the real exam.
home.benefit2Text: No shouting, no stress. You choose your instructor and lesson times to suit you.
home.benefit3Text: You learn in new cars with assist systems — the kind you'll really drive.
home.benefit4Text: You can split the course into interest-free instalments. Start now, pay gradually.
home.howTitle: From application to licence in 4 steps
home.step1Text: Traffic rules online and in person. Practical examples, not cramming.
home.step2Text: Your first contact with driving in the safe environment of a simulator.
home.step3Text: Parking, reversing and manoeuvres on our own practice area, stress-free.
home.step4Text: Real situations in the city and on the road, until you're fully confident.

about.title: Welcome to Autoškola IKARA.
about.intro: Autoškola IKARA offers its services and trains applicants for a category B1, B driving licence. Among Bratislava driving schools we stand out with an individual approach to applicants and high professional quality in teaching and refresher lessons.
about.heroPhoto: Drag a photo of the premises / team here
about.p1: We focus on preparing you not only for the exams of professional competence to obtain a driving licence, but also so that you can fully and smoothly join road traffic.
about.p2: You'll find our driving school in Petržalka, Bratislava, at Hrobákova street number 34. Theory lessons take place in our premises, equipped for full instruction. For practical training we have quality Hyundai vehicles available.
about.service1: Courses for driving licence applicants — both theory and practice.
about.service2: Refresher lessons for licence holders, with the option to start immediately.
about.service3: Every applicant gets a textbook and practice tests included in the price.
about.carsIntro: You'll do your practical training in our own Hyundai i30 — a reliable car, the kind you'll really drive.
about.carDesc: Our training vehicle. Manual transmission, clear controls and good visibility — ideal for practising gear changes, parking and smooth driving in traffic.
about.rangeDesc: You'll try manoeuvres such as parking, reversing and turning on our closed practice area — calmly and stress-free, away from traffic, until you master them with full confidence.
about.simDesc: You'll get your first contact with driving on a simulator — practising basic habits in a safe environment before driving a real car.

okurze.title: How the training works
okurze.intro: The course has a clear structure. You know exactly what to expect in each phase and how long it takes.
okurze.step1Text: Traffic rules, vehicle construction and principles of safe driving. Online materials + in-person sessions.
okurze.step2Text: Basic driving habits on a simulator and practical vehicle maintenance.
okurze.step3Text: Parking, turning and manoeuvres on a closed area until you handle them confidently.
okurze.step4Text: Real traffic in the city and beyond, final revision and exam preparation.
okurze.cond1: Minimum age 17 (driving with an accompanying person)
okurze.cond2: Medical certificate of fitness from a doctor
okurze.noFee: With us, you pay no exam fee to the driving school!
okurze.includedText: Every applicant gets a textbook and practice tests included. They also receive a free CD containing:
okurze.cd1Text: All current laws and regulations in one place.
okurze.cd2Text: Real traffic situations in a clear 3D view.
okurze.cd3Text: Mock tests exactly matching the real exam format.

kondicne.title: Return to the wheel with confidence.
kondicne.intro: For those who already hold a driving licence and want to improve their driving skills or simply need to refresh them. A refresher lesson takes place directly in traffic, not on a practice area, under the active supervision of an instructor.
kondicne.rangeDesc: One lesson lasts 90 min — the price is among the lowest in Bratislava.
kondicne.prepaidTitle: Only prepaid lessons can be scheduled
kondicne.prepaidDesc: After payment you choose a date that suits you and we add you to the instructor's schedule.

kurzy.title: Upcoming courses
kurzy.intro: Pick a date that suits you and click “I'm interested”. We'll pre-fill the form with the course number for you.

kontakt.title: Get in touch.
kontakt.intro: Write to us or call. We'll gladly advise you on choosing a course and a date.

form.name: Full name
form.messagePh: I'm interested in a course / refresher lessons…
form.thanksText: Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

signup.title: I'm interested
signup.confirm: I am signing up for course {id} and acknowledge this is a binding application.
signup.confirmErr: Please confirm the binding sign-up to submit.
signup.sentText: You've been signed up for course {id}. We'll get back to you within 24 hours with next steps.
signup.consent: By submitting you bindingly sign up for the selected course and agree to the processing of personal data.

cookies.bannerText: We need necessary cookies to run the site. With your consent we'll also use analytics and marketing cookies (e.g. to show the Google map). More in the
cookies.settingsIntro: Choose which cookies we may use. You can change your choice at any time.
cookies.necessaryDesc: Needed for the basic functioning of the site (e.g. remembering this consent). Cannot be turned off.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Anonymous traffic statistics so we can improve the site. (Not deployed yet.)
cookies.marketingDesc: Third-party content, e.g. showing the Google map on the Contact page.
cookies.pageIntro: Cookies are small files the site stores in your browser. We always use necessary cookies, others only with your consent. You can change or withdraw consent at any time.
cookies.consentText: You can adjust your cookie settings at any time. You can also remove cookies directly in your browser settings.
